_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate inclusion of collection plan in appropriate documentation.
reference_document_element_description: Govern the enterprise reference data library, including controlled vocabulary management, change request processing, and version control.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-011 (DG, cosine: 0.377), OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.367).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.7/10 (raw 0.173). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, collection, coordinate, documentation, inclusion, plan] vs WIDAI-only terms [change, control, controlled, data, enterprise, govern] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.877, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 8-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.2%, N:61.1%, C:38.7%). No dominant classification for "Coordinate inclusion of collection plan in appropriate documentation." vs "Govern the enterprise reference data library, including controlled vocabulary ma" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.381 > STS 0.173 (gap +0.208). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [appropriate, collection, coordinate, documentation, inclusion, plan]. WIDAI terms: [change, control, controlled, data, enterprise, govern].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.208 with low STS 0.173. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
